column1: # Startup splash — mirrors the 1-2-3 R3.4a welcome screen with our branding.
# The app announces itself, shows licensing info (user + organization) and
# waits for any key before dropping into READY. Passing a file on the CLI
# skips this screen (covered by unit tests on App::new_with_file).
# Any key dismisses the splash and drops straight into READY without
# dispatching the keystroke (so the 'a' does NOT start a LABEL entry).
